gold.title: Animated Search Bar
gold.reason: Gooey animated effect on a search bar is visually distinctive and immediately eye-catching on a marketing homepage hero section.

gold.title: Glowing Input
gold.reason: Framer Motion glowing border with Sparkles icon and animated submit arrow — polished AI-era aesthetic perfect for newsletter or lead-gen forms.

gold.title: Animated Input
gold.reason: Typewriter-cycling placeholder with orb glow effect creates a striking search/ask-anything input ideal for hero sections.

gold.title: Password Input
gold.reason: Real-time strength meter with color-coded progress bar, animated requirement checklist, and dark-mode support — a complete, polished signup form centerpiece.

gold.title: Input
gold.reason: Gradient border (green-to-cyan via CVA variants) with Framer Motion animated toolbar including mic, attachment, and AI wand icons — highly distinctive prompt-style input.

gold.title: Input
gold.reason: GSAP-powered radial gradient spotlight that tracks the mouse along the input border — a rare, premium hover effect that elevates any contact form.

gold.title: Smart Textbox
gold.reason: @mentions with inline tag chips and AI ghost-text autocomplete — the most feature-rich, visually distinctive text input in the collection.

gold.title: Floating Label
gold.reason: Animated floating label is a UX best practice that looks polished and professional, directly elevating contact and signup forms on marketing sites.

gold.title: Floating Input
gold.reason: Clean floating label with icon support and smooth focus animation — immediately usable in any marketing site form with a premium feel.

gold.title: Password Input 1
gold.reason: Strength score with animated color-coded progress bar and animated requirement checklist — polished, production-ready signup form component.

gold.title: AI Input
gold.reason: Auto-resizing textarea with Framer Motion animated action bar (attach, globe, send) — visually rich, modern AI-era input suitable for landing page demos.

gold.title: Color Input
gold.reason: Sophisticated HEX input with opacity slider, color swatches, clipboard integration, and animated gradient thumb — unique and visually striking.

gold.title: Color Picker
gold.reason: Full @uiw/react-color integration giving a complete color picker widget — visually distinctive and rare in the shadcn ecosystem.

gold.title: Phone Input
gold.reason: Flag-based country selector with react-phone-number-input and Command palette search — polished, internationally ready phone field for contact forms.

gold.title: Composer Input
gold.reason: Rich-text composer with Framer Motion animated toolbar (bold, italic, link, code, attach, mic, AI wand) — a premium, distinctive textarea for modern SaaS landing pages.

gold.title: Search With Category
gold.reason: Category-select and search input fused into a unified pill with a search button — a classic but well-executed pattern that elevates site-wide search bars.

gold.title: Input With Tags
gold.reason: Framer Motion animated tag chips inside an input — a visually polished multi-value field great for newsletter interest selectors on landing pages.

silver.title: Input
silver.reason: Error/success/clear states with focus rings and smooth transitions — a good multi-state input for forms, but no visually distinctive flair.

silver.title: Tag Input
silver.reason: Tag suggestions, autocomplete, custom colors, and max-limit — feature-rich and useful for forms, but visually standard.

silver.title: Autocomplete
silver.reason: Well-built autocomplete with Fancy Multi Select foundation — solid for search forms but relies on existing library conventions without notable visual upgrades.

silver.title: Multiselect
silver.reason: Reliable multi-select from a reputable UI library — dependable and well-structured but standard shadcn aesthetic.

silver.title: Input
silver.reason: Multi-size variants, prefix/suffix slots, and error state — a well-structured utility input with practical composition but no unique visual identity.

silver.title: Input
silver.reason: CVA-based input with eye/clear icons and transition-all — clean and versatile, a good styled foundation for marketing forms.

silver.title: Password Input 2
silver.reason: Same strength-meter pattern as Password Input 1 with minor styling variation — useful but silver due to redundancy.

silver.title: Password Input 3
silver.reason: Adds HoverCard tooltip for requirement details — a thoughtful UX addition but the third variant of the same pattern.

silver.title: Password Input
silver.reason: Clean show/hide toggle with basic styling — useful and clean but minimal compared to the strength-meter variants.

silver.title: Input With Feedback
silver.reason: Error message and helper text below input — a clean and practical validation pattern, but straightforward with no visual flair.

silver.title: Action Hub Input
silver.reason: Async action buttons (copy, delete) with per-action loading states — useful UX utility, but complex for typical marketing site forms.

silver.title: Inline Copy Input
silver.reason: Copy-to-clipboard with check animation — a clean, practical pattern for API key or invite-link display on SaaS sites.

silver.title: URL Input
silver.reason: Dynamically fetches and displays target-site favicon — a clever UX touch for URL fields on website-builder or SEO-tool landing pages.

silver.title: Input With Select
silver.reason: Number input with inline unit selector — practical combination widget for pricing or configuration forms.

silver.title: Password Field
silver.reason: Password input with requirements checklist and show/hide toggle — solid pattern with enough UX detail to stand above bare bronze.

silver.title: Tag Input
silver.reason: Framer Motion animated tag removal with predefined options — clean and animated, good for interest/skill selectors on onboarding forms.

silver.title: Tags Selector
silver.reason: Framer Motion animated tag cloud selector from a predefined list — useful for filter UIs on marketing landing pages.

silver.title: Number Input
silver.reason: NumberFlow-powered animated digit transitions — visually smooth and distinctive for quantity selectors or pricing inputs.

silver.title: Numeric Input
silver.reason: Stepper buttons with progress bar and min/max labels — informative and clean, good for configurators and onboarding flows.

silver.title: Input
silver.reason: Neobrutalism styling with thick border-2 and selection color highlights — stylistically distinct but niche; won't fit most marketing sites.

silver.title: Inline Edit
silver.reason: Smooth click-to-edit transition — useful for CMS-style inline editing on content-heavy or dashboard sites.

silver.title: Smart Assist Input
silver.reason: Input history recall, copy-to-clipboard, and inline validation with label — a compact but feature-rich input with strong UX utility.

silver.title: Text Field [react-aria-components]
silver.reason: Accessible, well-structured text field via react-aria — solid accessibility foundation but no unique visual upgrade.

silver.title: Search Field [react-aria-components]
silver.reason: Accessible search field with clear button — good foundation for accessible forms, but visually standard.

silver.title: Base Input
silver.reason: base-ui + CVA size variants with focus ring and error state — well-engineered and clean, a reliable form building block.

bronze.title: Input
bronze.reason: The raw shadcn Input primitive — no visual upgrade; serves only as the base for other components.

bronze.title: OTP Input
bronze.reason: OTP inputs are too app-specific (2FA flows) to add value on a marketing website redesign.

bronze.title: OTP Input
bronze.reason: Duplicate OTP input — same app-specific concern with no marketing site utility.

bronze.title: Input OTP
bronze.reason: Third OTP variant — entirely app-specific, no value for website redesign contexts.

bronze.title: OTP Input
bronze.reason: Fourth OTP variant — app-specific, no marketing site use case.

bronze.title: Date Wheel Picker
bronze.reason: iOS-style 3D scroll-wheel date picker — a mobile-app UX pattern that is impractical and out of place on marketing site forms.

bronze.title: Time Picker
bronze.reason: Time-specific input — too niche for general website redesign; belongs in booking or scheduling applications.

bronze.title: Time With Icon
bronze.reason: Simple time input with a clock icon — minimal visual upgrade and app-specific use case.

bronze.title: Time Field [react-aria-components]
bronze.reason: Accessible segmented time field — app-specific input type with no marketing site use case.

bronze.title: NumberField [react-aria-components]
bronze.reason: Accessible number stepper — functional but no visual upgrade over a standard number input.

bronze.title: Numeric Scrubber
bronze.reason: Drag-to-scrub number input inspired by video editing software — interesting but far too app-specific for marketing site forms.

bronze.title: Slider
bronze.reason: Basic slider with no distinctive description or visual upgrades — a generic utility primitive.

bronze.title: Range Slider Input
bronze.reason: Range slider — useful for price filters but too utilitarian; no visual upgrade appropriate for a marketing form.

bronze.title: Multiple Select
bronze.reason: Basic checkbox-style multi-select list filed under inputs — no visual upgrade over shadcn defaults.

bronze.title: Select
bronze.reason: A standard select wrapper filed under inputs — no visual distinction from the shadcn primitive.

bronze.title: Correct Number Input
bronze.reason: Sparse description and no notable visual features visible in the code — appears to be a minimal numeric input wrapper.

bronze.title: Ruixen Input02
bronze.reason: Mixing cycling placeholder prompts with password requirements creates an incoherent component that doesn't excel at either use case.

bronze.title: Input (ravikatiyar162 duplicate note)
bronze.reason: Classified as Gold for gradient border composer — the plain input variant within the same file is shadcn-wrapped with no added value.
